Bundled third-party libraries
=============================

These libraries are bundled locally so the plugin never calls an external server
at runtime. Their licence files sit alongside them.

pdfjs/
  PDF.js by Mozilla, version 3.11.174 (legacy build for broad browser support).
  Files: pdf.min.js, pdf.worker.min.js.
  Licence: Apache License 2.0 (see pdfjs/LICENSE).
  Source: https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js

stpageflip/
  StPageFlip by Nodlik, version 2.0.7 (browser build).
  File: page-flip.browser.js (exposes window.St.PageFlip).
  Licence: MIT (see stpageflip/LICENSE).
  Source: https://github.com/Nodlik/StPageFlip
